name: Spicy Corn Ragout
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large, deep skillet or Dutch oven.
2. Add garlic and onion. Cook gently until tender and fragrant, but do not brown.
3. Add red peppers and jalapenos. Cook for 5 to 10 minutes.
4. Stir in corn and mix together well. Add stock and bring to a boil. Cook gently for 5 minutes.
5. Stir in spinach and cook for 5 minutes longer, just until wilted.
6. Add black pepper, salt (if desired), and basil. Taste and adjust seasonings as necessary.
